properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v5 v6 v7 v7 v8 v1 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm caught up in Your presence I just want to sit here at Your feet I'm caught up in this holy moment I never wanna leave

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, I'm not here for blessings Jesus, You don't owe me anything More than anything that You can do I just want You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm sorry when I've just gone through the motions I'm sorry when I just sang another song Take me back to where we started I open up my heart to You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm sorry when I've come with my agenda I'm sorry when I forgot that You're enough Take me back to where we started I open up my heart to You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, I'm not here for blessings Jesus, You don't owe me anything And more than anything that You can do I just want You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I just want You Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will do I just want You Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will do

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I just want You Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will do I just want You Nothing else, nothing else, Jesus Nothing else will do

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I'm coming back to where we started I'm coming back to where we started When I first felt Your love You're all that matters, Jesus You're all that matters I'm coming back to what really matters Just Your heart I just wanna bless Your heart, Jesus

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And oh, I'm not here for blessings Jesus, You don't owe me anything More than anything that You can do Oh, I just want You
